title: Alpha Engine Executor Parameters
description: Backtester-optimized executor parameters. Written by backtester to config/executor_params.json. Read by executor at runtime, merged with risk.yaml.

min_score.description: Minimum trading score for new entries (backstop gate)

max_position_pct.description: Maximum single position as fraction of NAV

time_decay_reduce_days.description: Days held before position size reduction

updated_at.description: Date backtester last updated these params

best_sharpe.description: Sharpe ratio of the best param combo

best_alpha.description: Alpha of the best param combo

manual_override.description: Explanation if params were manually overridden
